nasb.text: You will die the death of the uncircumcised By the hand of strangers, For I have spoken!’ declares the Lord God!” ’ ”

esv.text: You shall die the death of the uncircumcised by the hand of foreigners; for I have spoken, declares the Lord God.”

cnv.text: 你必死在外族人手裡，與未受割禮的人一樣， 因為這是我曾說過的， 這是主耶和華的宣告。’”

ccb.text: 你要像未受割礼的人那样死在外族人手中。’ 这是主耶和华说的。”
